description_long: This is a light blue ceramic cup with a rounded body and a wide, slightly flared rim. The cup features a sturdy, curved handle attached to one side, allowing for a comfortable grip. On the front, there is a printed design that reads '#1 DAD' in bold, dark letters above a stylized mustache graphic, giving it a personalized and playful touch. The surface of the cup is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and showing subtle highlights. There are faint, irregular marks or smudges visible on the exterior, possibly simulating fingerprints or wear. The interior of the cup is also light blue and appears clean and unadorned.
description: A glossy light blue ceramic cup with a wide rim, curved handle, and a '#1 DAD' mustache graphic on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the '#1 DAD' text and mustache graphic, with the handle on the left.
description_view_1: Side view with no handle visible, showing faint smudge marks on the plain blue surface.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the open top and the handle on the right, with part of the graphic barely visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle, with the graphic mostly out of sight and the cup's smooth surface prominent.
